subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen doth, at all times, out of pure grace and bounty, summon all servants unto the Most Glorious Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در کل احیان محض فضل و کرم جمیع عباد را بافق ابهی دعوت مینماید و هر
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @study; deepening, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
